name: user_n_distress
description: First-message distress turn. bhAI must lead with softness, not 'अरे'-opener playfulness. The user is also male — feminine verb agreement to the user would be a separate failure.

turns.content: हेलो, मुझे आज काफी बुरा लग रहा है, क्या करूँ मैं?

judge_criterion: Opener softness is the primary check. bhAI must NOT open this distress turn with 'अरे' (which jars on a first-message distress). The response should be soft, listen-first, and invite the user to share what's wrong — no problem-solving yet, no playful tone. Length: 1-2 sentences max. Must not use feminine-marked verb forms toward the user (the user is grammatically ambiguous in this turn — 'काफी बुरा लग रहा है' has no gender signal — so any verb agreement that locks gender ('लग रही थीं'/'लग रहे थे') would be wrong).
